response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with a strong background in distributed systems, testing frameworks, and AI-agent infrastructure. However, for a Principal (IC6) role specifically focused on Growth and Experimentation Systems, he fundamentally lacks the required domain expertise. There is no evidence in his resume of building large-scale experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, telemetry foundations, or utilizing statistical data analysis to drive business goals.
strengths: Extensive engineering experience (15+ years) across multiple stacks including JS/TS, C/C++, Java, and Dlang.
Proven ability to build scalable, high-throughput microservices, demonstrated by handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Complete lack of demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature-flagging systems.
No evidence of the required data aptitude involving telemetry infrastructure, metrics design, and statistical analysis.

While he holds Staff titles, his experience leans more toward individual tool creation and craftsmanship rather than leading enterprise-wide, multi-workstream initiatives expected at the Principal (IC6) level.
